name: ScrollArea

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: When the scrollbars become visible. Mirrors Radix UI's ScrollArea type: Auto (default) — bars show only when the content overflows. Always — bars are always visible and the gutter is reserved (no layout shift when content grows). Scroll — bars show while scrolling. Hover — bars show on hover / focus within. Implemented cross-browser via the lumeo-scrollarea CSS (Firefox scrollbar-* + WebKit pseudo-elements). Firefox exposes only a thin bar, so the Hover/Scroll auto-hide granularity is a WebKit/overlay enhancement that degrades gracefully to a persistent thin bar there.

parameters.name: FocusRingGutter
parameters.description: Adds a 4px inline gutter (-mx-1 px-1, net-zero layout) so a focusable control's focus ring isn't clipped at the left/right edge. Per CSS spec overflow-auto on one axis promotes the other to auto too, so a full-width <Input> flush against the scroll box loses its box-shadow ring on that edge. Opt-in (default false) because the negative margin makes the element 4px wider per side — only enable when the scroll area holds focusable controls (forms, menus), not when it wraps edge-aligned content like a table.

examples.title: Vertical Scroll
examples.code:
Tags

@foreach (var tag in _tags) {
@tag
}

examples.title: Chat Messages
examples.code:
@foreach (var msg in _messages) {
@msg.Text
}

examples.title: Horizontal Scroll
examples.code:
@for (var i = 1; i <= 12; i++) {
Item @i
}

examples.title: Scrollbar Type
examples.code:
<ScrollArea Type="ScrollArea.ScrollAreaType.Always" Class="h-40 rounded-md border p-4">
    @* always-visible scrollbar, gutter reserved *@
</ScrollArea>

<ScrollArea Type="ScrollArea.ScrollAreaType.Hover" Class="h-40 rounded-md border p-4">
    @* scrollbar appears on hover / focus-within *@
</ScrollArea>

mdSummary:
# ScrollArea

Styled custom scrollbar container.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/scroll-area

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ScrollArea | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ScrollArea | Type | `ScrollAreaType` | `ScrollAreaType.Auto` | When the scrollbars become visible. Mirrors Radix UI's ScrollArea type: Auto (default) — bars show only when the content overflows. Always — bars are always visible and the gutter is reserved (no layout shift when content grows). Scroll — bars show while scrolling. Hover — bars show on hover / focus within. Implemented cross-browser via the lumeo-scrollarea CSS (Firefox scrollbar-* + WebKit pseudo-elements). Firefox exposes only a thin bar, so the Hover/Scroll auto-hide granularity is a WebKit/overlay enhancement that degrades gracefully to a persistent thin bar there. |
| ScrollArea | FocusRingGutter | `bool` | `false` | Adds a 4px inline gutter (-mx-1 px-1, net-zero layout) so a focusable control's focus ring isn't clipped at the left/right edge. Per CSS spec overflow-auto on one axis promotes the other to auto too, so a full-width <Input> flush against the scroll box loses its box-shadow ring on that edge. Opt-in (default false) because the negative margin makes the element 4px wider per side — only enable when the scroll area holds focusable controls (forms, menus), not when it wraps edge-aligned content like a table. |
| ScrollArea | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ScrollArea | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ScrollArea) — RenderFragment slot

- (none)

